nav.footerTagline: {app} — made in Paraguay by Koeti Labs, for MSMEs.

common.purchaseOrdersLocked: Purchase orders require the Premium or Empresarial plan.

auth.brandQuote: Real-time stock control for Paraguayan small businesses — no spreadsheets, no notebooks.

marketing.eyebrow: Made in Paraguay by Koeti Labs
marketing.subtitle: Products, warehouses, purchase orders, and a full movement ledger — so you can stop tracking stock in notebooks or spreadsheets.
marketing.trustLine: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
marketing.featuresTitle: Everything your business needs, nothing it doesn't
marketing.featuresSubtitle: Not a spreadsheet with extra steps — a real inventory system built for how a small business actually runs.
marketing.featureWarehousesDesc: Track stock per location and assign staff to the warehouse they're responsible for.
marketing.featureLedgerDesc: Every entrada, salida, and transfer is logged — who moved what, when, and why.
marketing.featureAlertsDesc: Know what's running out and what's expiring before it becomes a problem.
marketing.featurePurchasingDesc: Order from suppliers and receive stock — partial or full — with an approval step.
marketing.featureReportsDesc: Valuation, top sellers, low stock, expiring soon — filtered, and one click to CSV.
marketing.featureRolesDesc: Owners, managers who approve, warehouse staff scoped to their own location, and read-only viewers.
marketing.ctaTitle: Your inventory starts on page one.
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Products, stock movements, and purchase orders ship ready to use. What you build on top of it is yours.

pricing.title: Priced for a real Paraguayan business.
pricing.subtitle: Start free, no card required. Upgrade when you need more room to grow — cancel whenever you want.
pricing.freeNoSupport: For trying it out — no support included.
freeFeatures: Low-stock & expiring-soon reports (view only, no CSV export)

overview.title: Overview
overview.noSalesDesc: Post a "sale" movement to see your best sellers here.
overview.noLowStockDesc: Every product is at or above its minimum stock.

products.emptyDesc: Add your first product to start tracking stock.

warehouses.emptyDesc: Add a warehouse to start posting stock movements.
warehouses.staffEmptyDesc: Assign a warehouse to a staff member to scope their movements.

suppliers.emptyDesc: Add a supplier to start creating purchase orders.

movements.panelDesc: Post entradas, salidas, and transfers — an append-only audit log.
movements.emptyDesc: Post a movement above to start the ledger.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.description: Order from suppliers and receive stock, partial or full.
purchaseOrders.emptyDesc: Create an order to start restocking from a supplier.

lowStock.title: Low Stock
lowStock.description: Products at or below their minimum stock threshold.
lowStock.emptyDesc: Every product is at or above its minimum stock.

expiringSoon.title: Expiring Soon
expiringSoon.emptyDesc: No batches are approaching their expiry date in this window.

insights.enterpriseOnly: AI-powered restock suggestions are an Empresarial feature. Upgrade to get a daily, prioritized restock suggestion plus low-stock alerts.

insightMessages.lowStockAlert: {name} ({sku}) is low: {stock} in stock, minimum is {minStock}.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.invoiceNote: Required for your invoice (factura): tax ID and legal name.
checkout.invalid: Check the document number and legal name.
checkout.noPlanDesc: Pick a plan on the pricing page to start checkout.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Electronic invoices (SIFEN) emitted for your team's payments.
invoices.emptyDesc: An invoice is emitted automatically after each payment.
